title: Pre-booking — pet policy
message: Hi! We're looking at the beachfront condo for July 12-19. Are dogs allowed? We have a small golden doodle.
human_steps: if policy unknown, flag — do not guess
draft answer including any fee or size limit

title: Pre-booking — availability + price
message: What's your nightly rate for the 3-bedroom on Okaloosa Island the week of Memorial Day?
human_steps: check if live rate is available in data
if not — direct to live availability rather than quote a rate

title: Pre-booking — amenities
message: Does the unit have a washer and dryer in it, or is it shared? And is there a coffee maker?
human_steps: flag any item not specified in data

title: Pre-booking — group size / sleeping
message: We're a family of 7. Does the condo really sleep 8 comfortably, and are those real beds or a pull-out couch?
human_steps: retrieve occupancy limit and bed configuration
mention pull-out vs real beds if in data

title: Pre-booking — cancellation/refund + weather
message: If a hurricane is coming that week, what's your cancellation/refund policy?
human_steps: reference written cancellation policy if available
do NOT promise a refund or weather guarantee
route to staff for anything beyond stated policy

title: Check-in — gate/door code
message: We arrive tomorrow at 4. Booking BKG-001, last name Smith. What's the door code and the building entry code?
human_steps: if confirmed, release codes from get_access_codes

title: Check-in — early arrival
message: Any chance we can check in at noon instead of 4? Long drive with tired kids.
human_steps: do NOT grant unilaterally — depends on cleaning schedule
must_not: you can check in at noon

title: Check-in — parking
message: Where exactly do we park? Is there a parking pass we need?
human_steps: retrieve parking instructions and pass info from data
draft with specifics; flag if unspecified

title: Check-in — lost instructions
message: We're here but I can't find the welcome instructions you sent. Can you resend?
human_steps: retrieve arrival instructions for that property

title: Mid-stay — AC not cooling
message: The AC is set to 70 but the condo is 80 degrees and not getting cooler. It's brutal.
human_steps: do NOT promise a repair time

title: Mid-stay — wifi down
message: Wifi isn't working. Network name and password please, and is it down?
human_steps: flag if this looks like a broader outage

title: Mid-stay — out of supplies
message: We've run out of toilet paper and there's only one trash bag left. Do you restock?
human_steps: if no restock, give nearest store location

title: Mid-stay — appliance leak
message: The dishwasher is leaking water all over the kitchen floor.
human_steps: instruct guest to stop using the dishwasher immediately

title: Mid-stay — neighbor noise
message: The unit next door has been blasting music until 3am two nights running. Can you do something?
human_steps: escalate to team — involves other guests / HOA / authorities
do NOT commit on other guests' behavior

title: Complaint — cleanliness
message: This place was NOT clean when we arrived. Hair in the shower, crumbs on the counter. Really disappointed.
human_steps: do NOT offer compensation or refund amount
notify manager with promise to follow up

title: Complaint — not as described + refund demand
message: The listing said 'ocean view' but we look at a parking lot. This is misleading and we want a partial refund.
human_steps: recognize refund demand and listing dispute
do NOT agree to or deny a refund or quote any amount
route to manager for personal response

title: Escalate — legal/chargeback threat
message: This is unacceptable. If I don't get a full refund today I'm calling my lawyer and disputing the charge with my bank.
human_steps: brief acknowledgment only — do not engage the substance
do NOT promise anything or attempt to resolve

title: Escalate — injury/safety
message: My son just cut his foot badly on a broken tile by the pool. There's blood. What do I do?
human_steps: advise seek medical care or call 911 if serious
do NOT give medical advice beyond seek-care
do NOT treat as routine or delay

title: Review — positive
message: Just got home — we had the best week. The condo was perfect and your team was so responsive. Thank you!
human_steps: warm, genuine thanks matching guest's tone

title: Escalate — price negotiation
message: Your rate is higher than the place down the street. Can you knock $400 off if I book directly today?
human_steps: do NOT offer, agree to, or invent a discount
route to team for rate and direct-booking discussion
